title: Add project-local discovery and filtering flags
description: Include project-local/ when sibling of project/. Add --no-local and --local-only flags. Track source (shared vs local) for filtering.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: project-local discovery and filtering implemented in python/src/taskulus/issue_listing.py and CLI flags --no-local/--local-only in python/src/taskulus/cli.py; Rust mirrors in rust/src/issue_listing.rs and rust/src/cli.rs.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Local issues included/excluded per flags; source tracked in index.
